_publications._publicationTitle: Molecular conformation of the full-length tumor suppressor NF2/Merlin--a small-angle neutron scattering study.

_contextSnippet: However, for the full-length Merlin(wt) and Merlin(S518D), the N value indicate that less than 40% of Merlin or Merlin(S518D) are active or competent in binding to NHERF1
details: Successfully measured binding affinities and stoichiometry, showing N values close to 1 for FERM domains but less than 40% active fraction for full-length Merlin proteins binding to NHERF1
